fields.name: Sell-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the customer that the items were shipped to.
The program copies the number from the Sell-to Customer No. field on the sales header.
You cannot change the number because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Bill-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the customer that you sent the invoice for the shipment to.
The program copies the customer number from the Bill-to Customer No. field on the sales header.
You cannot change the number because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Bill-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer that you sent the invoice to.

fields.name: Bill-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address that you sent the invoice to.

fields.name: Bill-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the extended address that you sent the invoice to.

fields.name: Bill-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer on the sales document.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person you regularly contact at the customer to whom you sent the invoice.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the customer's reference.
The program copies the reference from the Your Reference field on the sales header.
You cannot change the reference because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Ship-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer that you delivered the items to.

fields.name: Ship-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the the name of the customer that you delivered the items to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address that you delivered the items to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the extended address that you delivered the items to.

fields.name: Ship-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer on the sales document.

fields.name: Ship-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Order Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the order date for the shipment.
The program copies the date from the Order Date field on the sales header.
You cannot change the order date because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the shipment was posted.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when items on the document are shipped or were shipped. A shipment date is usually calculated from a requested delivery date plus lead time.

fields.name: Posting Description
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a description of the shipment, such as Shipment 22890.
The program copies the posting description from the Posting Description field on the sales header.
The posting description also appears on customer and G/L entries.
You cannot change the posting description because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Payment Terms Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code to use to find the payment terms that apply to the shipment.
The program copies the code from the Payment Terms Code on the sales header.
The payment terms are used to calculate the due date and payment discount date from the posting date, and to find the payment discount percentage.
You cannot change the payment terms code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date on which the shipment is due for payment. The program calculates the date using the Payment Terms Code and Posting Date fields on the sales header.
The program copies the date from the Due Date field on the sales header.
Once orders, invoices and shipments have been posted, the due date can be used to find the customers with overdue bills.
You cannot change the due date because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Payment Discount %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the payment discount percentage granted if payment is made by the date entered in the Pmt. Discount Date field.
The program copies the discount percentage from the Payment Discount % field on the sales header.
You cannot change the payment discount percentage because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Pmt. Discount Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date by which the shipment must be paid to obtain a payment discount.
The program copies the payment discount date from the Pmt. Discount Date field on the sales header.
Once orders, invoices and shipments have been posted, the payment discount date is used to calculate payment discounts on payments from customers.
You cannot change the payment discount date because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipment method for the shipment.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location from where inventory items to the customer on the sales document are to be shipped by default.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Customer Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the name of the customer posting group that was used when this shipment was posted.
The program copies the customer posting group from the Customer Posting Group field on the sales header.
You cannot change the customer posting group because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code of the shipment.

fields.name: Currency Factor
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Customer Price Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the customer price group code used on the shipment.
The program copies the customer price group code from the Customer Price Group field on the sales header.
You cannot change the customer price group because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Prices Including VAT
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the unit prices on the shipment lines include VAT.
The program copies the information from the Prices Including VAT field on the sales header.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Invoice Disc. Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code used to calculate the invoice discount.
The program copies the invoice discount code from the Invoice Disc. Code field on the sales header.
You cannot change the invoice discount code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Customer Disc. Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the customer discount group code used to calculate the customer's sales line discount.
The program copies the code from the Customer Disc. Group field on the sales header.
You cannot change the customer discount group because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a code for the language used on the shipment lines.
The program copies the code from the Language Code field on the sales header.
The language code made it possible for the items on the shipment lines to be written in the customer's language.
You cannot change the language code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which salesperson is associated with the shipment.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the sales order that this invoice was posted from.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether or not a comment has been entered for this sales shipment header.
You can also enter a comment in Notes FactBox.

fields.name: No. Printed
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many times the document has been printed.

fields.name: On Hold
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the shipment was marked as on hold when it was posted.
The program copies the information from the On Hold field on the sales header.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the shipment has been applied to an already-posted document. If so, the field shows the type of document it was applied to.
The program copies the information from the Applies-to Doc. Type field on the sales header.
You cannot change the applies-to document type because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the shipment has been applied to an already-posted document. If so, the field contains the number of the document it was applied to.
The program copies the document number from the Applies-to Doc. No. field on the sales header.
You cannot change the applies-to document number because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Bal. Account No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the general ledger account to which a balancing entry for the shipment was posted.
The program copies the balancing account number from the Bal. Account No. field on the sales header.
You cannot change the balancing account number because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the customer's VAT registration number.
The program copies the number from the VAT Registration No. field on the sales header.
You cannot change the VAT registration number because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the reason code that is associated with the shipment.
The program copies the reason code from the Reason Code field on the sales header.
You cannot change the reason code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the general business posting group code that is assigned to the customer that you sent the invoice for the shipment to.
The program copies the code from the Gen. Bus. Posting Group field on the sales header.
You cannot change the code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: EU 3-Party Trade
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the shipment was a part of an EU 3-party trade.
The program copies the information from the EU 3-Party Trade field on the sales header.
You cannot change the information because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Type
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transaction type of the sales header that this line was posted from.
The program copies the transaction type from the Transaction Type field on the sales header.
You cannot change the transaction type because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Transport Method
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transport method of the sales header that this line was posted from.
The program copies the transport method from the Transport Method field on the sales header.
You cannot change the transport method because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip:
Shows the customer's VAT country/region code.
The program copies the VAT country/region code from the VAT Country/Region Code field on the sales header.
You cannot change the VAT country/region code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer who will receive the products and be billed by default.

fields.name: Sell-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's sell-to address.

fields.name: Sell-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's extended sell-to address.

fields.name: Sell-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer on the sales document.

fields.name: Sell-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact at the customer's sell-to address.

fields.name: Bill-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the post code of the customer's bill-to address.

fields.name: Bill-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Bill-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Sell-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code of the customer's main address.

fields.name: Sell-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Sell-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the customer on the sales document.

fields.name: Ship-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the post code of the customer's ship-to address.

fields.name: Ship-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Ship-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Bal. Account Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the balancing account type that is used on the shipment.
The program copies the balancing account type from the Bal. Account Type field on the sales header.
You cannot change the balancing account type because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Exit Point
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code of the port of exit through which you shipped the items out of your country/region.
The program copies the code from the Exit Point field on the sales header.
You cannot change the code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Correction
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether this sales shipment has been posted as a corrective entry.
The program copies the code from the Correction field on the sales header.
You cannot change the code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of the document.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number that the customer uses in their own system to refer to this sales document.

fields.name: Area
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the area code used in the shipment.
The program copies the code from the Area field on the sales header.
You cannot change the code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Specification
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the transaction specification that was used in the shipment.
The program copies the code from the Transaction Specification field on the sales header.
You cannot change the code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Payment Method Code
fields.tooltip:
Copies the code from the Payment Method Code field on the sales header.
You cannot change or delete the code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the shipping agent who is transporting the items.

fields.name: Package Tracking No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipping agent's package number.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the sales shipment.
The program automatically copies this field from the Shipping No. Series field on the sales header.
You cannot change the number series because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Order No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the order from which the shipment was created.
The program automatically copies this field from the No. Series field on the order header.
If the shipment was not created from an order, the field is blank.
You cannot change the number series because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the ID of the user who posted the sales shipment.
You cannot change the user ID because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the source code that is linked to the sales shipment header.
The program copies the source code from either the Sales field or the Deleted Document field in the Source Code Setup table.
You cannot change the source code because the entry has been posted.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the tax area code of the customer.
The program copies the code from the Tax Area Code field on the sales header.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that sales to the customer on the sales header were liable to sales tax.
The program copies the code from the Tax Liable field on the sales header.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the VAT business posting group of the customer.
The program copies the code from the VAT Bus. Posting Group field on the sales header.

fields.name: VAT Base Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage to use to discount the VAT element if a payment discount is to be posted. The value is validated against the maximum possible VAT Tolerance % field value in the General Ledger Setup. The maximum value cannot be overridden with the exception of a credit note where you can manually enter the value used for the payment discount.

fields.name: Quote No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the sales quote document if a quote was used to start the sales process.

fields.name: Ship-to Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number of the company's shipping address.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


You cannot change the contents of this field. Click the drop-down arrow to see the combination of posted dimension values.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Campaign No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the campaign that the document is linked to.

fields.name: Sell-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact number.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact person at the customer's bill-to address.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the responsibility center that serves the customer on this sales document.

fields.name: Requested Delivery Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that the customer has asked for the order to be delivered.

fields.name: Promised Delivery Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that you have promised to deliver the order, as a result of the Order Promising function.

fields.name: Shipping Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies how long it takes from when the items are shipped from the warehouse to when they are delivered.

fields.name: Outbound Whse. Handling Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date formula for the time it takes to get items ready to ship from this location. The time element is used in the calculation of the delivery date as follows: Shipment Date + Outbound Warehouse Handling Time = Planned Shipment Date + Shipping Time = Planned Delivery Date.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Service Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the service, such as a one-day delivery, that is offered by the shipping agent.

fields.name: Allow Line Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a line discount has been calculated for the price offered.
